Type Property# willResignActive

iOS 26.0+iPadOS 26.0+Mac Catalyst 26.0+macOS 26.0+tvOS 26.0+visionOS 26.0+watchOS 26.0+

```
static var willResignActive: NotificationCenter.BaseMessageIdentifier<NSExtensionContext.WillResignActiveMessage> { get }
```

Available when `Self` is `NotificationCenter.BaseMessageIdentifier<NSExtensionContext.WillResignActiveMessage>`.## [See Also](/documentation/foundation/notificationcenter/messageidentifier/willresignactive-9z4xc#see-also)
